name: Kingwood Golf Advantage School
about: The Kingwood Golf Academy is a training facility that provides an exceptional golfing experience. The academy features state-of-the-art amenities, including a lighted driving range with a grass tee box and over 50 tee stations, a 10,000 sq. foot practice putting and chipping green with a practice bunker, and a professional club repair service. Personalized instruction is offered by a team of over eight PGA Professionals to help golfers of all levels reach their goals. Services include individual lessons, custom club fitting using TrackMan launch monitor technology, and video swing analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium technology with TrackMan launch monitor for precise shot tracking
Expert instruction from a team of over eight PGA Professionals
Comprehensive practice facilities including a large putting/chipping green and driving range
Custom club fitting services using top manufacturers

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food services

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for precision club fitting and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The academy provides club fitting services, and it is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons. Rental clubs may be available, but this information is not specified.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food and drink services or policies regarding outside food and drinks. It is best to contact the academy directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a practice academy, the primary focus is on lessons and practice sessions rather than full 18-hole play. Simulators are not mentioned, so this activity may not be available.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers the Crush It! junior golf program for youth, indicating a kid-friendly environment with programs designed for younger golfers.
